label: Bring your own device — Custom HTTP webhook integration
items: Pick "Custom (HTTP webhook)" as the brand in the Connect Device wizard and Rhozly generates a unique webhook URL plus a 256-bit secret. Point your DIY Arduino / Home Assistant / ESP32 / anything that can POST JSON at that URL and the readings start flowing.
Both soil sensors and water valves are supported. The wizard shows the documented JSON shape with a sample payload + copy-to-clipboard.
Three webhook auth styles accepted: path segment, query string, or X-Rhozly-Token header — header wins when present. Pick whichever your firmware can do.

Custom devices plug into everything else for free: link the device to an area, the area's sensor panel shows the readings; the sensor-driven automations (Phase 3) can trigger off your data; AI care guides read it via the area's latest metrics.
